title: Photo-lipids in brazened fatty-acid sauce
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Photo-lipids in brazened fatty acid sauce''' could be served as a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] delicacy enjoyed by [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]]. The chef droid [[L9-G8]] instructed the rebel crew of the ''[[Bonderium]]'' to cook this dish for an Ugorian feast, in order to bribe [[ArrGack]] and [[GrrKack]] for admission to the [[Paradise system/Legends|Paradise system]].

==Behind the scenes==
Lipids are fatty chemicals. Photo-lipids may be fats that are affected by light.

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
